tasks: Define event goals and objectives
Select preferred event date and time
Set high-level event budget
Determine target audience and expected guest count
Research and select a suitable venue based on location and size
Establish catering requirements, menus, and select caterer
Identify and confirm key speakers or panelists
Review and sign vendor contracts (AV, catering, venue)
Finalize AV, lighting, and sound equipment list
Establish transport plan and scheduling for speakers and guests
Plan stage setup, banners, seating, and floor layout
Organize on-ground staff roles and volunteer timeline
Draft and send initial guest and speaker invite emails
Promote event on official social media and email newsletters
Draft and send event reminders and logistic updates
Prepare attendee badges, print booklets, and signages
Conduct pre-event dry run and AV setup checks
Manage guest check-ins and speaker ushering on event day
Draft and send thank-you emails with follow-up feedback forms
Conduct post-event budget reconciliation and vendor payouts
